allow: PowerShell($n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($n\) { node --version; npm --version } else { "node not found" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "D:\\PROJECT 1\\client"; npm approve-builds esbuild 2>&1; echo "---trying allow-scripts---"; npm config get allow-scripts 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "D:\\PROJECT 1\\client"; npm approve-scripts esbuild 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); try { $h = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:4000/api/health -TimeoutSec 5; "API health: $\($h | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { "API not ready: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $c = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5173 -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Client HTTP: $\($c.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Client not ready: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "D:\\PROJECT 1"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "D:\\PROJECT 1"; npm --prefix client run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "D:\\PROJECT 1"; npm --prefix client run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)
PowerShell("Opened https://chatapp-030v.onrender.com in your default browser")
